data.name: Validation_Field_CannotBeNullOrEmpty
data.value: {0}: Value cannot be null or empty.

data.name: Validation_Address_CountryNotSupported
data.value: {0}: {1} is currently not supported for address validation.

data.name: Validation_Provider_CountryNotSupported
data.value: {0}: {1} is currently not supported by the {2} Address Validation API.

data.name: Validation_Provider_OnlyValueSupportedInMode
data.value: {0}: Only the value {1} is supported by the {2} Address Validation API while in {3} mode.

data.name: Validation_Provider_OnlyValuesSupportedInMode
data.value: {0}: Only the values {1} are supported by the {2} Address Validation API while in {3} mode.
